reason: Full driver architecture: headless invocation, provider config, MCP allowlist, sandboxing pattern, agent YAML, run_attempt.sh + score_attempt.py sketches — copy-paste foundation for the runner.
MiMo API details: base URL, model id, no seed support, temp=0.3, 1M context, 1.6B token quota mechanics, rate limits — required for provider config and trial design.
abcoder + gitnexus stdio MCP wiring + per-repo indexing protocol; pre-index once per fixture and snapshot indexes to avoid per-attempt re-parse.
Background on TB-2 (rejected substrate); informs why SWE-bench Verified was chosen and what grading conventions to mirror.
Positioning: confirms no existing agent framework has a structured spec layer — Trellis's experimental claim is in a real gap.
Project script conventions — bench/ Python scripts must follow these (error handling, logging, CLI shape).
Error handling spec for any new bench/ scripts that wrap OpenCode + grader.
Thinking guide before writing any new bench/ helper — prefer reusing existing Trellis utilities over reinventing.
